mapper.insert: INSERT INTO payments ( quote_id, payment_number, amount, payment_method, payment_gateway, transaction_id, status, paid_at, refunded_at, refund_amount, refund_reason, failure_reason, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{quoteId}, #{paymentNumber}, #{amount}, #{paymentMethod}, #{paymentGateway}, #{transactionId}, #{status}, #{paidAt}, #{refundedAt}, #{refundAmount}, #{refundReason}, #{failureReason}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.select: SELECT id, quote_id, payment_number, amount, payment_method, payment_gateway, transaction_id, status, paid_at, refunded_at, refund_amount, refund_reason, failure_reason, created_at, updated_at FROM payments WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, quote_id, payment_number, amount, payment_method, payment_gateway, transaction_id, status, paid_at, refunded_at, refund_amount, refund_reason, failure_reason, created_at, updated_at FROM payments WHERE payment_number = #{paymentNumber}

SELECT id, quote_id, payment_number, amount, payment_method, payment_gateway, transaction_id, status, paid_at, refunded_at, refund_amount, refund_reason, failure_reason, created_at, updated_at FROM payments WHERE transaction_id = #{transactionId}

SELECT id, quote_id, payment_number, amount, payment_method, payment_gateway, transaction_id, status, paid_at, refunded_at, refund_amount, refund_reason, failure_reason, created_at, updated_at FROM payments WHERE quote_id = #{quoteId} ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT id, quote_id, payment_number, amount, payment_method, payment_gateway, transaction_id, status, paid_at, refunded_at, refund_amount, refund_reason, failure_reason, created_at, updated_at FROM payments WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{page.size} OFFSET #{page.offset}

SELECT id, quote_id, payment_number, amount, payment_method, payment_gateway, transaction_id, status, paid_at, refunded_at, refund_amount, refund_reason, failure_reason, created_at, updated_at FROM payments WHERE payment_method = #{paymentMethod} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{page.size} OFFSET #{page.offset}

SELECT id, quote_id, payment_number, amount, payment_method, payment_gateway, transaction_id, status, paid_at, refunded_at, refund_amount, refund_reason, failure_reason, created_at, updated_at FROM payments WHERE created_at BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{page.size} OFFSET #{page.offset}

SELECT id, quote_id, payment_number, amount, payment_method, payment_gateway, transaction_id, status, paid_at, refunded_at, refund_amount, refund_reason, failure_reason, created_at, updated_at FROM payments WHERE amount BETWEEN #{minAmount} AND #{maxAmount} ORDER BY amount DESC LIMIT #{page.size} OFFSET #{page.offset}
mapper.update: UPDATE payments SET amount = #{amount}, payment_method = #{paymentMethod}, payment_gateway = #{paymentGateway}, transaction_id = #{transactionId}, status = #{status}, paid_at = #{paidAt}, refunded_at = #{refundedAt}, refund_amount = #{refundAmount}, refund_reason = #{refundReason}, failure_reason = #{failureReason}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE payments SET status = 'REFUNDED', refund_amount = #{refundAmount}, refund_reason = #{refundReason}, refunded_at = #{refundedAt}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) as total_count, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'COMPLETED' THEN amount ELSE 0 END) as total_amount, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'COMPLETED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as completed_count, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'FAILED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as failed_count, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'REFUNDED' THEN refund_amount ELSE 0 END) as total_refund FROM payments WHERE DATE(created_at) = DATE(#{date})

SELECT COUNT(*) as total_count, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'COMPLETED' THEN amount ELSE 0 END) as total_amount, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'COMPLETED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as completed_count, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'FAILED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as failed_count, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'REFUNDED' THEN refund_amount ELSE 0 END) as total_refund FROM payments WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM created_at) = #{year} AND EXTRACT(MONTH FROM created_at) = #{month}

SELECT id, quote_id, payment_number, amount, payment_method, payment_gateway, transaction_id, status, paid_at, refunded_at, refund_amount, refund_reason, failure_reason, created_at, updated_at FROM payments WHERE status = 'COMPLETED' ORDER BY paid_at DESC LIMIT #{page.size} OFFSET #{page.offset}

SELECT id, quote_id, payment_number, amount, payment_method, payment_gateway, transaction_id, status, paid_at, refunded_at, refund_amount, refund_reason, failure_reason, created_at, updated_at FROM payments WHERE status = 'FAILED' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{page.size} OFFSET #{page.offset}

SELECT id, quote_id, payment_number, amount, payment_method, payment_gateway, transaction_id, status, paid_at, refunded_at, refund_amount, refund_reason, failure_reason, created_at, updated_at FROM payments WHERE status = 'REFUNDED' ORDER BY refunded_at DESC LIMIT #{page.size} OFFSET #{page.offset}
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) FROM payments WHERE status = 'COMPLETED' AND paid_at BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate}
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(refund_amount), 0) FROM payments WHERE status = 'REFUNDED' AND refunded_at BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate}
